CustomField.formula: IF( ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c,"1" ), "כללית", IF( ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c,"2" ) , "מכבי", IF( ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c,"3" ) , "מאוחדת", IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c,"4" ) , "לאומית", IF(ISPICKVAL(Insurer_factor__c,"2000" ) , "ענף"&" "& "תקציבים", "")))))
CustomField.label: Insurance Factor Text
